sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115648" key="yhfiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψηφ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n115648.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">involving calculations,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:191:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">191.30</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
